summary: Excellent soundboard recording that captures a strong second set with a standout “Loser” performance.
review: The repatched SBD source sounds crisp and well‑balanced, delivering the concert with clear instrumentation. Reviewers rave about the second set – especially the rendition of “Loser” – while noting the first set is less compelling, but overall the show is judged excellent.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are highly positive (4‑5 stars). The recording is praised as a “very nice board rendering,” and the show is described as excellent with a highlighted second set, justifying a rating in the high‑range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Board rendering noted as very nice; clean, crisp mix with no reported dropouts or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set is singled out as the highlight of the night; first set deemed less interesting but does not detract from the overall excellence of the performance.
